goal: Configure a Franka pick-place cell with dual-rate sensor fusion: setup_multi_rate sets lower_rate_hz=30 (camera/env render) and upper_rate_hz=1000 (force-torque control loop); add_force_torque_sensor attaches a wrist F/T sensor with noise_std=0.05; configure_ros2_time enables sim_time so downstream fusion nodes receive a consistent /clock; configure_ros2_bridge wires both the wrist camera and F/T sensor topics through the OmniGraph bridge. The canonical exercises the multi-rate VecEnv wrapper pattern — first use of setup_multi_rate in the library — and demonstrates timestamp-aligned sensor fusion distinct from all sort, pick-place delivery, RL-training, and SDG canonicals.
thoughts:
Design rationale for CP-NEW-multi-rate-sensor-fusion:

1) Pattern gap: setup_multi_rate has 0 uses across all 127+ library templates. This is the first canonical to exercise the dual-rate VecEnv wrapper. Pairing it with add_force_torque_sensor + configure_ros2_bridge + configure_ros2_time creates a 4-tool chain that is structurally novel.

2) Rate mapping:
   - lower_rate_hz=30: camera + physics env step rate (30 fps is standard for visual observation).
   - upper_rate_hz=1000: force-torque control loop rate (1 kHz matches real robot force controllers, e.g. KUKA/ABB typical ~1 kHz).
   - upper_dof=7: Franka has 7 DOF; the 'upper body' maps to the full arm (proprioception + FT).

3) add_force_torque_sensor:
   - sensor_path='/World/Franka/panda_hand/WristFTSensor'
   - parent_path='/World/Franka/panda_hand'
   - threshold=10.0 N (trigger on contact force > 10 N for grasp detection)
   - noise_std=0.05 (5% noise, realistic sim-to-real gap emulation)
   - publish_topic='/franka/wrist_ft' (ROS2 stub for fusion node)

4) configure_ros2_time mode='sim_time': critical for sensor fusion — /clock must be consistent across all subscribers so camera frame timestamps and FT timestamps can be aligned by the fusion node.

5) configure_ros2_bridge: two sensors — wrist camera (RGB, 30 Hz) and FT sensor (already configured with publish_topic). sensors list format per ConfigureRos2BridgeArgs: type + prim_path + topic + hz.

6) Scene: table + Franka + overhead DomeLight. No cube spawning needed — this canonical is infrastructure/setup only. Target object is a simple cube for context but no delivery gate.

7) Physics: CPU dynamics (enable_gpu_dynamics=False) for deterministic FT readings.

8) Verified_status: drafted — function gate requires live Kit RPC + ROS2 domain.
code:
# ── Ground and lighting ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight", intensity=900.0)
create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/Ground",
    prim_type="Cube",
    position=[0, 0, -0.5],
    scale=[20, 20, 1],
)
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── Physics: CPU dynamics for deterministic F/T readings ─────────────────────
set_physics_scene_config(
    config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"}
)

# ── Robot mounting table ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/Table",
    prim_type="Cube",
    position=[0, 0, 0.375],
    scale=[0.7, 0.7, 0.375],
)
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── Target object (provides contact surface for F/T calibration) ─────────────
create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/Cube",
    prim_type="Cube",
    position=[0.4, 0.0, 0.78],
    scale=[0.05, 0.05, 0.05],
)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Cube", schema_name=api)
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/Cube", attr_name="physics:mass", value=0.3)

# ── Franka arm ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Base at z=0.75 (table top). Faces +Y.
robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

# ── Wrist F/T sensor ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Attaches force/torque sensor to panda_hand; publishes on /franka/wrist_ft.
# threshold=10.0 N: trigger event on contact > 10 N (grasp onset detection).
# noise_std=0.05 N/N·m: realistic sim-to-real F/T noise model.
add_force_torque_sensor(
    sensor_path="/World/Franka/panda_hand/WristFTSensor",
    parent_path="/World/Franka/panda_hand",
    threshold=10.0,
    noise_std=0.05,
    publish_topic="/franka/wrist_ft",
)

# ── Dual-rate VecEnv wrapper ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
# lower_rate_hz=30: camera + physics env step (visual observation pipeline).
# upper_rate_hz=1000: force-torque control loop (matches real robot F/T rate).
# upper_dof=7: Franka 7-DOF arm — all joints map to the high-rate control path.
setup_multi_rate(
    lower_rate_hz=30.0,
    upper_rate_hz=1000.0,
    upper_dof=7,
)

# ── ROS2 sim-time clock ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# mode='sim_time': publish Isaac Sim /clock so all fusion-node subscribers
# can stamp their messages from the same monotonic clock regardless of rate.
configure_ros2_time(mode="sim_time")

# ── OmniGraph ROS2 bridge for camera + F/T sensor ──────────────────────────
# Camera: RGB image at 30 Hz from a wrist-mount perspective prim.
# FT sensor: already has publish_topic set; listed here so bridge validates QoS.
configure_ros2_bridge(
    sensors=[
        {
            "type": "camera_rgb",
            "prim_path": "/World/Franka/panda_hand/WristCamera",
            "topic": "/franka/wrist_rgb",
            "hz": 30,
        },
        {
            "type": "force_torque",
            "prim_path": "/World/Franka/panda_hand/WristFTSensor",
            "topic": "/franka/wrist_ft",
            "hz": 1000,
        },
    ],
    ros2_domain_id=0,
)

# ── Start simulation ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
sim_control(action="play")
# After play: camera publishes at 30 Hz on /franka/wrist_rgb;
# WristFTSensor publishes at 1 kHz on /franka/wrist_ft;
# both timestamps derive from the /clock published by configure_ros2_time.
# The fusion node (external to sim) can align frames by /clock header.
code_template:
# ── Ground and lighting ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight", intensity=900.0)
create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/Ground",
    prim_type="Cube",
    position=[0, 0, -0.5],
    scale=[20, 20, 1],
)
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(
    config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"}
)

create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/Table",
    prim_type="Cube",
    position=[0, 0, 0.375],
    scale=[0.7, 0.7, 0.375],
)
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── Robot ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
robot_wizard(
    robot_name="{{primary_robot.class}}",
    dest_path="{{primary_robot.path}}",
    position={{primary_robot.position}},
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

# ── F/T sensor ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
add_force_torque_sensor(
    sensor_path="{{ft_sensor.path}}",
    parent_path="{{ft_sensor.parent_path}}",
    threshold={{ft_sensor.threshold}},
    noise_std={{ft_sensor.noise_std}},
    publish_topic="{{ft_sensor.topic}}",
)

# ── Dual-rate wrapper ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
setup_multi_rate(
    lower_rate_hz={{multi_rate.lower_hz}},
    upper_rate_hz={{multi_rate.upper_hz}},
    upper_dof={{multi_rate.upper_dof}},
)

# ── ROS2 clock + bridge ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
configure_ros2_time(mode="sim_time")
configure_ros2_bridge(
    sensors=[
        {
            "type": "camera_rgb",
            "prim_path": "{{wrist_camera.path}}",
            "topic": "{{wrist_camera.topic}}",
            "hz": {{multi_rate.lower_hz}},
        },
        {
            "type": "force_torque",
            "prim_path": "{{ft_sensor.path}}",
            "topic": "{{ft_sensor.topic}}",
            "hz": {{multi_rate.upper_hz}},
        },
    ],
    ros2_domain_id=0,
)

sim_control(action="play")
failure_modes: setup_multi_rate upper_rate_hz must be an integer multiple of lower_rate_hz for clean decimation — 1000/30 is not exact; in practice use 960 or accept fractional drop at decimation boundary.
configure_ros2_bridge type='force_torque' may not be a registered sensor type in all Isaac Sim versions — fall back to 'generic_publisher' if the bridge rejects the type string.
configure_ros2_time must be called before configure_ros2_bridge so the ROS2Context node is created first; reversing the order causes a missing-clock-node error.
add_force_torque_sensor parent_path must point to a prim that exists after robot_wizard completes — verify panda_hand USD path with list_all_prims if the sensor attach fails.
WristCamera prim does not exist by default on the Franka USD; create_prim a Camera at that path before configure_ros2_bridge or the bridge will report missing prim.
verified_status: drafted-2026-05-16; form-gate pending; function-gate pending (requires live Kit + ROS2 domain)
